sentences.arabic: يُنْصَحُ الْمُسَافِرُونَ بِحَجْزِ تَذَاكِرِ الطَّيَرَانِ مُبَكِّرًا لِلِاسْتِفَادَةِ مِنَ الْأَسْعَارِ الْمُنْخَفِضَةِ.
sentences.translation: Putnicima se savjetuje da rezervišu avionske karte unaprijed kako bi iskoristili niže cijene.
sentences.translationEn: Travellers are advised to book flights early to take advantage of lower prices.
